caption: A presentation slide titled "Buy downs" focuses on the concept of "buying down" the cost of an existing home. The slide features a house icon and a photograph of a white single-story house with black shutters, captioned "Norfolk AHT Buy down program." Text on the left lists characteristics of the process: "Structured many different ways," "High subsidy per unit," and "Slow accumulation of units." Three yellow oval bubbles outline the steps: "Acquire homes," "Contribute difference," and "Allocate vouchers." A yellow banner at the bottom of the slide contains the text "MHP" and "Acquire." In the top right corner of the screen, a small inset window shows a person with short dark hair. Across the frames, the content of the slide remains static, while the person in the inset window appears in different positions and expressions, suggesting a recorded presentation.
